summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that PNW is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $100.76. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 19.0%. The asset has recently tested this support 3 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $103.47 and a significant trendline confluence around $103.42 (formed by 8 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
